@startuml
skinparam classDiagram labelStyle fontname "Helvetica"
skinparam classDiagram labelStyle font-size 12
skinparam classDiagram labelStyle font-weight bold
skinparam classDiagram labelStyle font-family "Arial"

class Driver {
    + listOfCities : String[]
    + listOfNames : String[]
    + listOfColours : String[]
    + main()
    + debug_main()
    + debug_constructorAndToString()
    + debug_equals()
    + debug_randomObjects()
    + debug_copyConstructor()
    + fillArrayPublicTransport()
    + fillArrayPublicTransport()
    + printingArrayObjects()
    + traceSearchLeastAndMostExpensive()
    + getRandomInt()
    + getRandomPrice()
    + getRandomYear()
    + getRandomPublicTransport()
    + getRandomAircraft()
    + getRandomFerry()
    + getRandomCityBus()
    + getLineName()
    + getRandomTram()
    + getRandomMetro()
}

@enduml
